title: Ascending fade
description: Changes chunk fade to make it ascend.
body:
Changes chunk fade to make it ascend from below using 25w44a feature with vanilla shaders.

This pack uses 25w44a chunk fade feature to make animation. Speed of animation is controlled by vanilla "video settings -> chunk fade" slider.
